summary: Tested 6 critical bug fixes from user screenshots. All features working correctly. Fixed minor currency display bug ($ -> ₹) in Admin Dashboard.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_INR_Client and TEST_USD_Client sales during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 critical bug fixes verified: (1) Analytics Dashboard shows real data (₹540K revenue, ₹33.5K commission, 19 sales), (2) Monthly revenue endpoint returns data, (3) Case completion rate endpoint works, (4) Product update with base_fee/fee alias works, (5) Sale currency handling stores original_currency correctly, (6) Custom commissions CRUD works with edit/delete buttons. Fixed minor bug: Admin Dashboard Received/Pending amounts now show ₹ instead of $.

monthly_revenue.details: GET /api/analytics/monthly-revenue returns data array with revenue entries

case_completion_rate.details: GET /api/analytics/case-completion-rate returns total, completed, active, rate fields

product_update.details: PUT /api/products/{id} accepts both base_fee and fee (alias) fields

sale_currency.details: POST /api/sales with currency=INR stores original_currency=INR, USD converts to INR

custom_commissions.details: CRUD operations work - create, get, resolve, delete custom commissions

ticket_filters.details: Client-side filtering works - API returns status/priority fields for filtering

login_all_roles.details: Admin, Case Manager, Partner, Client all login successfully

document_download.details: GET /api/documents/case/{id} returns documents with id field for download

currency_display.details: All currency displays show ₹ (INR) across Admin and Partner dashboards

bug_fixed_during_testing.issue: Received and Pending amounts showed $ instead of ₹
